title: DJ BoBo — Biography and Career of the Swiss Pop-Dance Legend
metaDescription: DJ BoBo biography and career — from street rapper to eurodance megastar. Read the story of the Swiss legend heading to Ostrava.
excerpt: When you think of 1990s eurodance, one name rises above the rest — DJ BoBo. The Swiss singer, dancer, and producer, born René Peter Baumann, is one of the most successful European artists of his gener...
body:
## DJ BoBo — Biography and Career of the Swiss Pop-Dance Legend

When you think of 1990s eurodance, one name rises above the rest — DJ BoBo. The Swiss singer, dancer, and producer, born René Peter Baumann, is one of the most successful European artists of his generation. Over more than three decades, he has sold over 15 million records, performed thousands of concerts, and his shows rank among the most technically demanding productions on the continent.

### Childhood and First Steps in Music

René Peter Baumann was born on January 5, 1968, in Interlaken, a picturesque Swiss town nestled in the Alps. Music fascinated him from an early age — as a teenager, he took up breakdancing and rap. It was the street culture of the 1980s that shaped his approach to music and performance. At the turn of the 1980s and 1990s, he worked as a DJ in clubs in Basel and Zurich, where he earned the nickname BoBo — reportedly after a friend who called him that.

### Breakthrough in the 1990s

1992 became a turning point. DJ BoBo released his debut single **Somebody Dance with Me**, which immediately shot to the top of the charts across Europe. The combination of a catchy chorus, energetic rap, and dance rhythm defined the sound of the entire eurodance era. The single sold millions of copies and opened the door to an international career.

In the following years, hit after hit followed:

- **Take Control** (1993) — confirmation of talent
- **Let the Dream Come True** (1994) — an anthem of optimism
- **Freedom** (1995) — one of the greatest career hits
- **Love Is All Around** (1996) — DJ BoBo's romantic side
- **Everybody** (1997) — a single known by virtually everyone

The 1990s meant absolute dominance in the pop-dance genre for DJ BoBo. His albums regularly ranked at the top of the Swiss, German, and Austrian charts.

### Tours as Theatrical Performances

What sets DJ BoBo apart from other dance performers is his approach to live shows. Since the mid-1990s, he has conceived his tours as spectacular multimedia productions. Each tour had its own story, set design, costumes, and choreography.

Among the most famous:

| Tour | Year | Characteristics |
|---|---|---|
| World in Motion | 1997 | First major arena tour |
| Mystorial | 2017 | Journey through music history |
| KaleidoLuna | 2019 | Space theme |
| Evolut30n | 2023 | Celebration of 30 years |
| Great Adventure | 2025 | The most spectacular show yet |

Each show features dozens of dancers, LED walls, laser effects, and pyrotechnics. DJ BoBo himself actively dances and sings throughout the entire concert, which is certainly not a given for performers of his age.

### Eurovision and Other Milestones

In 2007, DJ BoBo represented Switzerland at the Eurovision Song Contest with the song **Vampires Are Alive**. Although the result didn't meet his expectations, the performance confirmed his status as an international star and brought him new fans, especially in Eastern Europe.

Throughout his career, he has received numerous awards:

- Multiple Swiss Music Award winner
- World Music Award for best-selling Swiss artist
- Echo Music Award (nomination)
- More than 200 gold and platinum records

### Personal Life

DJ BoBo is known for his stable personal life. He has been married to Nancy Rentzsch, a former member of his dance group, since 2006. The couple has a daughter, Jessie-Lee. The family lives in the canton of Aargau in Switzerland. BoBo is known for his modesty and professionalism — colleagues describe him as a workaholic who personally oversees every detail of his shows.

### DJ BoBo in 2026 — Still at the Top

Even after more than thirty years on the scene, DJ BoBo shows no signs of slowing down. His **Arena Tour 2026** is heading to the largest venues across Europe, including the Czech Republic. Fans in the Moravian-Silesian Region can look forward to his [concert at Ostravar Aréna on October 17, 2026](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava), which promises to be one of the highlights of the entire tour.

DJ BoBo represents a unique phenomenon in European pop music — an artist who managed to survive the rise and fall of eurodance, adapt to changing trends, and remain true to his style. His concerts are an experience for all generations, from those who remember the 1990s to their children who know his hits from TikTok.

If you're interested in other [events in Ostrava](/akce), the [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce) portal offers a complete overview of concerts and festivals in the region — from summer open-air events like the [Hradní Oldies Festival](/akce/hradni-oldies-festival) to the family-friendly [Fesťáček](/akce/festacek).

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**What is DJ BoBo's real name?**
DJ BoBo's real name is René Peter Baumann. He was born on January 5, 1968, in Interlaken, Switzerland.

**How many albums has DJ BoBo released?**
DJ BoBo has released more than 15 studio albums. Among the most successful are There Is a Party (1994), World in Motion (1996), and KaleidoLuna (2019).

**When will DJ BoBo perform in Ostrava?**
DJ BoBo will perform in Ostrava on October 17, 2026, as part of Arena Tour 2026 at Ostravar Aréna. Tickets are available at [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava).

**How many concerts has DJ BoBo performed?**
Throughout his career, DJ BoBo has performed over 3,000 concerts worldwide, primarily in Europe.

**Did DJ BoBo represent Switzerland at Eurovision?**
Yes, in 2007 with the song Vampires Are Alive. The performance was visually one of the most impressive of that year.

title: DJ BoBo Greatest Hits — From Everybody to Freedom
metaDescription: Overview of DJ BoBo's greatest hits — Everybody, Chihuahua, Freedom, and more. A complete guide to the songs of the Swiss eurodance legend.
excerpt: DJ BoBo is one of the most prolific European pop-dance artists. Over more than three decades, he has recorded hundreds of songs, dozens of which became international hits. Some of them are known by vir...
body:
## DJ BoBo Greatest Hits — From Everybody to Freedom

DJ BoBo is one of the most prolific European pop-dance artists. Over more than three decades, he has recorded hundreds of songs, dozens of which became international hits. Some of them are known by virtually everyone who grew up in the 1990s — and thanks to social media, a new generation is discovering them too. Let's take a look at the most significant ones, chronologically from the first breakthrough to the present.

### Somebody Dance with Me (1992) — Where It All Began

DJ BoBo's debut single started an avalanche. The combination of reggae samples, energetic rap, and an unforgettable female vocal in the chorus created a recipe that defined the entire eurodance genre. The song reached the top 10 in Germany, Austria, Switzerland, and other countries. To this day, it remains one of the most played tracks at retro parties across Europe.

What makes the song exceptional:
- Innovative mix of reggae and dance
- One of the very first eurodance hits
- Still works as a floor-filler on every dance floor

### Take Control (1993) — Confirmation of Talent

The second single had to prove that Somebody Dance with Me wasn't a fluke. Take Control managed that with ease. A harder beat, more confident rap, and another catchy chorus cemented DJ BoBo's position as a leading star of the dance scene.

### Let the Dream Come True (1994)

An optimistic anthem that became the soundtrack of the summer of 1994. DJ BoBo showed his ability to write songs with a positive message that doesn't come across as cheap. The melody of the chorus is so infectious that you only need to hear it once and it'll be stuck in your head all day.

### Freedom (1995) — The Peak of the Eurodance Era

Many fans consider Freedom to be DJ BoBo's best song ever. The epic chorus, powerful message of freedom, and flawless production made it an anthem for an entire generation. The song became the title track of the album of the same name, which sold millions of copies.

| Song | Year | Highest Position (DACH) | Album |
|---|---|---|---|
| Somebody Dance with Me | 1992 | #2 | Dance with Me |
| Take Control | 1993 | #5 | Dance with Me |
| Let the Dream Come True | 1994 | #3 | There Is a Party |
| Freedom | 1995 | #1 | Freedom |
| Love Is All Around | 1996 | #4 | World in Motion |
| Everybody | 1997 | #1 | Planet Colors |
| Chihuahua | 2002 | #1 | Chihuahua |
| Vampires Are Alive | 2007 | #8 | Vampires Are Alive |

### Love Is All Around (1996)

DJ BoBo proved he could handle a more romantic register. Love Is All Around is a ballad in a dance coat — emotional yet still danceable. The song expanded his audience to include listeners who wouldn't have dared try pure eurodance.

### Everybody (1997) — An Immortal Anthem

If there's one song most people associate with DJ BoBo, it's Everybody. The simple yet brilliant chorus *"Everybody, come on, dance and sing"* became a universal call to dance at stadiums, weddings, and festivals around the world. The song remains an integral part of every DJ BoBo concert, and its opening notes reliably get the whole venue on its feet.

### Chihuahua (2002) — An Unexpected Comeback

At the turn of the millennium, it seemed like the eurodance era was over. DJ BoBo saw it differently. In 2002, he released Chihuahua — a playful, slightly crazy song that became a worldwide hit. The song reached number one in several European countries and put DJ BoBo back in the spotlight. It's proof of his ability to reinvent his sound and surprise even those who had written him off.

Why Chihuahua works:
- Unexpected, playful concept
- Extremely catchy melody
- Perfect summer track
- Viral potential long before the social media era

### Vampires Are Alive (2007) — The Eurovision Adventure

The song with which DJ BoBo represented Switzerland at the Eurovision Song Contest. Theatrical, dramatic, and visually striking — just like DJ BoBo on stage. Even though the Eurovision result wasn't dazzling, the song gained its own fan base.

### Modern Hits — A New Era

DJ BoBo hasn't stopped at nostalgia. In recent years, he's been releasing material that combines his classic sound with modern production:

- **InCelebration** (2014) — celebrating 22 years of career
- **Kaleidoluna** (2018) — an experiment with a space theme
- **Evolut30n** (2022) — thirtieth anniversary, remastered classics and new songs
- **Life Is a Circus** (2024) — return to pure pop-dance

### Which Hits Will You Hear at the Concert in Ostrava?

DJ BoBo is known for including a cross-section of his entire career in his setlists. At the [Arena Tour 2026 at Ostravar Aréna](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava), you can expect:

- All the big hits — Everybody, Freedom, Chihuahua, Somebody Dance with Me
- Material from the latest albums
- Special remixed versions of classics with new arrangements
- A visually unique rendition of each song

If you're heading to the concert and want to refresh your memory of the hits, we recommend going through the overview above and creating your own playlist. At the concert itself, though, you'll find you know the lyrics by heart — that's how deeply these melodies have embedded themselves in our collective memory.

A complete overview of [events in Ostrava](/akce) including other concerts can be found on the [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce) portal. Besides DJ BoBo, this year you can also look forward to [Kollárovci at Slezskoostravský hrad](/akce/kollarovci-slezskoostravsky-hrad) or the spectacular [Hradní Oldies Festival](/akce/hradni-oldies-festival) with Village People and Michal David.

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**What is DJ BoBo's biggest hit?**
The most well-known hit is undoubtedly Everybody from 1997. Commercially, the most successful was the single Chihuahua (2002), which reached number one in several European countries simultaneously.

**How many singles has DJ BoBo released?**
DJ BoBo has released over 50 singles during his career spanning more than 30 years.

**Does DJ BoBo sing live at concerts?**
Yes, DJ BoBo sings live at his concerts. He combines singing with rap and dancing, which is typical of his shows.

**Does DJ BoBo play new songs at concerts, or just old hits?**
Yes, the setlist typically combines classic hits with new material. Approximately two-thirds of the setlist consists of well-known hits, with the rest being newer songs.

**Where can I see DJ BoBo live in the Czech Republic in 2026?**
DJ BoBo will perform on October 17, 2026, at Ostravar Aréna in Ostrava. Tickets are on sale at [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava).

body:
## DJ BoBo Arena Tour 2026 — What to Expect from the Show in Ostrava

Friday, October 17, 2026 will go down in the history of Ostrava's concert scene. Swiss pop-dance legend DJ BoBo will bring his monumental **Arena Tour 2026** to Ostravar Aréna. It is one of the few Czech stops on a tour that passes through the largest venues in Europe — and Ostrava has the honor of being one of them. If you're considering attending, we've prepared a complete overview of what awaits you.

### When and Where

- **Date:** Friday, October 17, 2026
- **Venue:** Ostravar Aréna, Ruská 3077/135, Ostrava-Vítkovice
- **Doors open:** 6:30 PM
- **Show starts:** 8:00 PM
- **Estimated duration:** approx. 2.5 hours including encore

Ostravar Aréna is the largest multifunctional hall in the Moravian-Silesian Region with a capacity of over 12,000 spectators. A sellout is expected for the DJ BoBo concert — his shows consistently attract high attendance across Europe.

### Ticket Categories and Prices

DJ BoBo Arena Tour 2026 offers three ticket categories, differing in comfort and view of the stage:

| Category | Price | What's Included |
|---|---|---|
| **Stands** | 975 CZK | Numbered seat in the stands, standard view |
| **VIP Stands** | 2,490 CZK | Premium seat with better view, VIP entrance |
| **Golden Seating** | 3,990 CZK | Best seats in the venue, exclusive zone, priority entrance |

Tickets are on sale at [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava). Given DJ BoBo's popularity in the Czech Republic, we recommend not leaving your purchase to the last minute — especially the Golden Seating and VIP Stands categories sell out quickly.

### What to Expect from Arena Tour 2026

DJ BoBo is renowned for the fact that his concerts are not just a musical experience, but a complete show-business spectacle. Arena Tour 2026 continues the tradition of his spectacular tours and brings:

**Visual Aspects:**
- Giant LED walls with three-dimensional projections
- Laser show synchronized with the music
- Pyrotechnic effects including flame throwers and confetti
- Moving stage elements and lifts

**Musical Program:**
- A cross-section of a thirty-year career — from Somebody Dance with Me to the newest material
- Everybody, Freedom, Chihuahua, and other immortal hits
- New arrangements of classic songs
- Live band complemented by electronic production

**Performance Elements:**
- Dance ensemble of 12–16 professional dancers
- Elaborate choreography for each song
- Acrobatic elements
- Costume changes during the show

### Who Is the Concert Suitable For

DJ BoBo concerts are a family affair. At his shows, you'll meet:

- **The 30–50 generation** — those who remember the eurodance era and grew up with his hits
- **Younger audiences** — who discovered his songs through social media and the retro wave
- **Couples** — the concert is a great tip for an unusual Friday evening
- **Groups of friends** — an ideal opportunity for a nostalgic evening out

DJ BoBo creates an atmosphere at his concerts where everyone feels part of the show. Interaction with the audience is one of his trademarks — expect to be singing and dancing.

### Arena Tour 2026 in the Context of the Tour

The Ostrava stop is part of a European tour that includes dozens of cities:

- Germany — Berlin, Munich, Hamburg, Cologne
- Switzerland — Zurich, Basel, Bern
- Austria — Vienna, Graz
- Czech Republic — **Ostrava**
- Poland — Katowice, Warsaw

The fact that DJ BoBo chose Ostravar Aréna as one of the few Czech stops speaks to the quality of the venue and the strong fan base in the region.

### Why You Shouldn't Miss This Concert

There are several reasons why Arena Tour 2026 is worth your time:

1. **Production value** — DJ BoBo's shows are among the most expensive and elaborate in Europe. The price-to-experience ratio is exceptional.
2. **Rarity in the Czech Republic** — DJ BoBo visits rarely. The next opportunity may not come for several years.
3. **Universal experience** — everyone knows his hits. You don't have to be a hardcore fan to enjoy the concert.
4. **Professionalism** — even at 58, DJ BoBo delivers 100% performances. He sings live, dances, and has mastered the art of entertainment.

### Ostrava — A City Full of Events

DJ BoBo isn't the only star visiting Ostrava in 2026. If you're looking for more cultural experiences, check out the complete overview of [events in Ostrava](/akce). As early as May, the [Hradní Oldies Festival](/akce/hradni-oldies-festival) takes place at Slezskoostravský hrad with legends like Village People, Michal David, and Tublatanka. For families with children, there's the summer [Fesťáček](/akce/festacek) in July.

Ostrava has established itself in recent years as one of the most important concert cities in the Czech Republic — and DJ BoBo Arena Tour 2026 is further proof.

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

**How much do tickets for DJ BoBo in Ostrava cost?**
Tickets are available in three categories: Stands for 975 CZK, VIP Stands for 2,490 CZK, and Golden Seating for 3,990 CZK. You can purchase them at [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava).

**When does the DJ BoBo concert start at Ostravar Aréna?**
Doors open at 6:30 PM, the show itself starts at 8:00 PM and lasts approximately 2.5 hours.

**Is the DJ BoBo concert suitable for children?**
Yes, the concert is suitable for all age groups. DJ BoBo shows are family-friendly and safe. Children under a certain age (usually 6) may enter for free when accompanied by a parent — check the current conditions on the event page.

**Will DJ BoBo perform anywhere else in the Czech Republic?**
Ostrava is one of the few Czech stops on Arena Tour 2026. We recommend following [AKCE OSTRAVA](/akce) for current information.

**How do I get to Ostravar Aréna?**
The arena is accessible by trams no. 1, 2, and 11 (Městský stadion stop). Parking is available directly at the venue. A detailed guide can be found in our article on [practical concert information](/akce/dj-bobo-arena-tour-2026-ostrava).

title: DJ BoBo at Ostravar Aréna — A Complete Concert Guide
