body:
## Concerts in Ostrava October 2026 — DJ BoBo and other stars

October 2026 in Ostrava will belong to one name — **DJ BoBo**. The Swiss king of eurodance will bring his legendary Arena Tour to **Ostravar Aréna on 17 October 2026**, promising a show you will never forget. But the October concert programme of the Moravian-Silesian capital will offer a range of other events too. Let us take a look at what awaits you.

### DJ BoBo Arena Tour — the main event of October

**René Peter Baumann**, known to the entire world as **DJ BoBo**, is among the absolute legends of the European dance scene. Over more than three decades of his career, he has sold over 25 million records, played thousands of concerts, and created hits that literally everyone knows.

And on **17 October 2026**, his Arena Tour will visit Ostrava. Ostravar Aréna will transform for one evening into a dance mecca full of pyrotechnics, light effects, dozens of dancers, and of course — immortal hits.

### What to expect from the DJ BoBo show

DJ BoBo is known for the fact that his concerts are not "just" concerts. They are spectacular shows that combine music with a theatrical experience. Here is what you can expect:

- **Pyrotechnics and special effects** — fireworks, explosions, laser shows right on stage
- **Large dance ensemble** — dozens of professional dancers in elaborate choreographies
- **Visual show** — LED screens, projections, and scenography at world-class level
- **Costume changes** — DJ BoBo and his team change costumes several times during the evening
- **Audience interaction** — BoBo is a showman who draws the audience into the action

### Hits you will hear

The DJ BoBo Arena Tour setlist covers his entire career. Fans can look forward to songs that defined the European dance scene:

| Song | Year released | Note |
|---------|-----------|----------|
| Somebody Dance with Me | 1992 | The breakthrough hit that launched his career |
| Everybody | 1994 | An anthem for an entire generation of dance fans |
| Freedom | 1995 | An energetic celebration of life and independence |
| Love Is All Around | 1996 | An emotive ballad with a dance foundation |
| Chihuahua | 2002 | A mega hit of the new millennium, known worldwide |
| It's My Life | 1997 | An inspirational anthem with a positive message |
| Pray | 1996 | A spiritual dimension in dance music |

And that is just a fraction. DJ BoBo has dozens of hits in his repertoire and his concerts last over two hours of pure performance time.

### Ostravar Aréna — the ideal space for a big show

Ostravar Aréna is practically made for productions like the DJ BoBo Arena Tour. The multifunctional arena with a capacity of over **10,000 spectators** offers:

- **Top-tier sound system** — professional audio ensuring perfect listening from every seat
- **Modern lighting** — a flexible lighting rig for spectacular light shows
- **Large stage** — sufficient space for the complete scenography and dance ensemble
- **Comfortable facilities** — comfortable seating, ample refreshments, clean toilets
- **Excellent transport access** — tram directly to the arena, parking capacity in the surrounding area

[Tickets for DJ BoBo at Ostravar Aréna can be found here](/akce).

### Why you should not miss DJ BoBo in Ostrava

DJ BoBo is one of the few artists who can fill arenas after more than 30 years of career. And he has good reason — his shows are among the absolute best on the European concert scene. Here are five reasons not to miss his Ostrava concert:

1. **A unique show** — every tour brings a new concept, new effects, and surprises
2. **Nostalgia and the present** — classic hits in modern arrangements for 2026
3. **A family experience** — entire generations attend DJ BoBo, from teenagers to people in their fifties
4. **Arena atmosphere** — 10,000 people dancing to Everybody is an unforgettable experience
5. **Limited capacity** — major arena shows happen once every few years; the next opportunity may not come soon

### Other October concerts in Ostrava

DJ BoBo is the headline star of October 2026, but far from the only one. The autumn concert season in Ostrava is traditionally rich, and October offers a wide genre spectrum:

**Club scene** — Barrák Music Club, Klub Parník, and other Ostrava clubs host a range of Czech and international bands in October. Rock, metal, indie, alternative — there is something for everyone.

**Theatre scene** — The Moravian-Silesian National Theatre and other theatres launch new seasons with concert galas and musical performances.

**Jazz evenings** — autumn is traditionally a strong season for jazz and blues in Ostrava's clubs and cafés.

A complete overview of all October events can be followed at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

### Practical information for DJ BoBo in Ostrava

**Date:** 17 October 2026 (Saturday)
**Venue:** Ostravar Aréna, Ostrava
**Organiser:** RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION

**Getting to Ostravar Aréna:**
- **Public transport** — tram stop directly at the arena, connection from the city centre in minutes
- **Car** — parking areas around the arena; expect higher occupancy during major events
- **Train** — from the main station, take a tram directly to the arena

**Tickets:**
Tickets are available in presale at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce). We recommend not leaving your purchase to the last minute — DJ BoBo arena shows regularly sell out across Europe.

### Looking back at the 2026 season

October is a good time to look back at the entire 2026 concert season in Ostrava. And it has been exceptionally strong:

| Date | Event | Venue | Type |
|-------|------|-------|-----|
| 15 May | Kollárovci | Slezskoostravský hrad | Open-air concert |
| 16 May | Hradní Oldies Festival | Slezskoostravský hrad | Festival |
| 11 July | Fesťáček | Ostrava | Family festival |
| **17 October** | **DJ BoBo Arena Tour** | **Ostravar Aréna** | **Arena show** |

This lineup proves that Ostrava is a full-fledged concert city with events at an international level. The production company **RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION** brings performers and formats to the Moravian-Silesian capital that were previously the preserve of Prague or foreign cities.

### What comes after October

The concert season in Ostrava does not end with October. November and December will bring:

- **Pre-Christmas concerts** — special Christmas programmes by popular artists
- **Advent markets with live music** — Ostrava's square comes alive with music and Christmas magic
- **New Year's Eve galas** — a stylish entry into the new year with music and shows
- **Winter club season** — Ostrava's clubs run at full speed

Follow [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) for a complete overview of upcoming events.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### When does DJ BoBo perform in Ostrava?

**DJ BoBo Arena Tour** takes place on **17 October 2026** at **Ostravar Aréna** in Ostrava. It is a spectacular arena show with pyrotechnics, dancers, and a complete visual production.

### Where can I buy tickets for DJ BoBo in Ostrava?

Tickets for DJ BoBo at Ostravar Aréna can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce). Buy in presale — arena shows sell out.

### How long does a DJ BoBo concert last?

DJ BoBo Arena Tour concerts typically last over two hours of pure performance time. Including the support programme and intervals, allow for a total time of around three hours.

### Is the DJ BoBo concert suitable for children?

Yes, DJ BoBo concerts are suitable for the whole family. The show is visually attractive and the music is positive and danceable. For arena concerts, we recommend ear protection for younger children.

### How do I get to Ostravar Aréna?

Ostravar Aréna is excellently accessible by public transport — the tram stop is right at the arena. By car, parking areas are available in the surroundings. From the main station Ostrava-Svinov, you can reach it by tram in minutes.

### What other concerts are held in Ostrava in October 2026?

Besides DJ BoBo, October 2026 offers a range of club concerts, jazz evenings, and theatre performances. A complete overview can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

title: Summer concert season Ostrava 2026 — complete guide
metaDescription: Complete guide to the summer concert season in Ostrava 2026. Open-air events, festivals, castles, and tickets. Kollárovci, Hradní Oldies, Fesťáček, and more.
excerpt: Summer in Ostrava is synonymous with live music under the open sky. 2026 brings a packed programme full of concerts, festivals, and open-air events that will appeal to fans of all genres — from folk through pop and oldies to...
body:
## Summer concert season Ostrava 2026 — complete guide

Summer in Ostrava is synonymous with live music under the open sky. 2026 brings a packed programme full of concerts, festivals, and open-air events that will appeal to fans of all genres — from folk through pop and oldies to children's events. The Moravian-Silesian capital is once again becoming one of the most sought-after concert cities in Czechia.

### Why the summer season in Ostrava is exceptional

Ostrava boasts a unique combination of concert venues that you will not find elsewhere in the Czech Republic. The historic setting of Slezskoostravský hrad, the modern facilities of Ostravar Aréna, and a range of smaller open-air stages create a mosaic of opportunities for unforgettable musical experiences.

The 2026 summer season officially starts in May and continues through to September. During these months, dozens of concert events will take place in Ostrava and its surroundings — from chamber performances to large-capacity festivals with thousands of visitors.

### Main summer concerts and festivals 2026

Here is an overview of the most anticipated summer events in Ostrava:

| Event | Date | Venue | Genre |
|------|-------|-------|------|
| Kollárovci | 15 May 2026 | Slezskoostravský hrad | Folk / Romani music |
| Hradní Oldies Festival | 16 May 2026 | Slezskoostravský hrad | Oldies / retro pop |
| Fesťáček | 11 July 2026 | Ostrava | Children's festival |

[Complete overview of all events and tickets can be found here](/akce).

### Kollárovci at Slezskoostravský hrad — 15 May 2026

The Slovak musical group **Kollárovci** are among the most popular performers in the field of folk and Romani music in Central Europe. Their concert at **Slezskoostravský hrad on 15 May 2026** will be one of the first major open-air events of the summer season.

Kollárovci are known for their energetic show, in which the following blend together:

- **Traditional Slovak and Romani music** — an authentic sound that will resonate through the entire castle
- **Modern arrangements of folk songs** — a fresh take on the classics
- **Humour and audience interaction** — Kollárovci are famous for their communication with fans
- **Dance numbers** — every concert is both a visual and musical experience

Slezskoostravský hrad offers the ideal setting for this type of event. Historic walls, night-time lighting, and an open courtyard create an atmosphere that no enclosed hall can replicate.

### Hradní Oldies Festival — 16 May 2026

The very next day after Kollárovci, the **Hradní Oldies Festival** takes place at Slezskoostravský hrad. It is one of the biggest retro events in the region, featuring legendary performers such as Village People, Michal David, East 17, and Tublatanka.

The festival is an ideal choice for those who:

- Grew up with music of the 70s, 80s, and 90s
- Are looking for an all-day family programme
- Want to experience international stars in the unique castle setting
- Prefer outdoor events with an unforgettable atmosphere

### Fesťáček — 11 July 2026

The family festival **Fesťáček** takes place on **11 July 2026** and is aimed primarily at children and their parents. It is an event where music, entertainment, and education come together — the ideal opportunity for families with small children to spend a summer day full of fun together.

Fesťáček offers:

- **Concerts by children's performers** — popular songs that children know
- **Interactive workshops** — creative workshops and physical activities
- **Fairy-tale theatre** — performances for the youngest visitors
- **Competitions and games** — an all-day programme for the whole family

### Where summer concerts take place in Ostrava

Ostrava has several regular concert venues that fill with music during the summer season:

| Venue | Type | Capacity | Suitable for |
|-------|-----|----------|------------|
| Slezskoostravský hrad | Open-air, historic grounds | Thousands of visitors | Festivals, major concerts |
| Ostravar Aréna | Covered arena / open-air | 10,000+ | Arena shows |
| Dolní oblast Vítkovice | Industrial grounds | Variable | Festivals, alternative |
| City parks | Open-air | Variable | Chamber events |

### How to plan your summer concert season

To get the most out of the summer season, we recommend the following approach:

1. **Monitor the listings in advance** — the most attractive events sell out weeks ahead
2. **Buy tickets online** — avoid queues and get better seats
3. **Combine events** — some concerts take place on consecutive days (like Kollárovci and Hradní Oldies Festival)
4. **Consider accommodation** — if travelling from a greater distance, Ostrava offers a wide range of lodging options
5. **Check the weather** — open-air events depend on the weather; have a plan B ready

### Tips for visitors from other cities

Ostrava is excellently accessible by transport — by train, bus, and car. For visitors from Poland and Slovakia, the journey is short and comfortable, making Ostrava's events an ideal weekend trip.

- **By train** — direct connections from Prague, Brno, Olomouc, and Polish and Slovak cities
- **By car** — motorway connections via D1 and D56, ample parking near venues
- **By bus** — regular lines and special festival connections

### What to bring to an open-air concert

Summer open-air events have their specifics. Do not forget:

- Comfortable footwear — you will be standing and dancing for several hours
- An outer layer — summer evenings in Ostrava can be cool
- A raincoat — in case of rain
- Sunglasses and sunscreen — if the event starts during the day
- Sufficient cash and a payment card — stalls at festivals may not accept cards

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### When does the summer concert season start in Ostrava 2026?

The summer season starts in May 2026. Among the first major events are **Kollárovci at Slezskoostravský hrad on 15 May** and **Hradní Oldies Festival on 16 May 2026**.

### Where can I buy tickets for summer concerts in Ostrava?

Tickets for all major summer events in Ostrava can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce). We recommend buying tickets in advance — the most popular events sell out quickly.

### Are summer concerts in Ostrava suitable for families with children?

Yes — for example, the **Fesťáček** festival (11 July 2026) is specifically aimed at families with children. A number of other events offer family tickets or discounted entry for children.

### What happens if it rains at an open-air concert?

Most open-air events in Ostrava take place regardless of weather. Organisers provide partial cover, and in case of extreme conditions, they inform about changes on their websites and social media.

### How much do tickets for summer concerts in Ostrava cost?

Prices vary by specific event — from a few hundred crowns for smaller concerts to higher amounts for large festivals with international stars. Current pricing can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

title: Autumn concerts in Ostrava 2026 — the arena season approaches
metaDescription: Autumn concerts in Ostrava 2026. DJ BoBo at Ostravar Aréna, arena concerts, and cultural events. Complete overview of the autumn season and tickets.
excerpt: When summer ends and temperatures begin to drop, the concert scene in Ostrava certainly does not fall silent — quite the opposite. Autumn brings a shift to arena venues, where the quality of sound and visual effects reaches an entirely different...
body:
## Autumn concerts in Ostrava 2026 — the arena season approaches

When summer ends and temperatures begin to drop, the concert scene in Ostrava certainly does not fall silent — quite the opposite. Autumn brings a shift to arena venues, where the quality of sound and visual effects reaches an entirely different level. The 2026 season will offer a range of exceptional concert experiences, led by the spectacular **DJ BoBo show at Ostravar Aréna**.

### Why autumn is the ideal time for concerts

The autumn months — September, October, and November — have several key advantages for concert fans:

- **Stable conditions** — no weather worries; arena concerts take place regardless of conditions
- **Top-tier acoustics** — modern arenas offer professional sound at a different level than open-air stages
- **Spectacular productions** — artists can utilise complete lighting and visual technologies
- **Comfortable temperature** — no heat or cold, comfort throughout the entire concert
- **Fewer tourists** — easier transport, parking, and overall calmer organisation

### DJ BoBo Arena Tour — the main event of autumn 2026

The absolute highlight of the autumn season in Ostrava will be the **DJ BoBo Arena Tour**, which comes to **Ostravar Aréna on 17 October 2026**. Swiss showman René Peter Baumann is synonymous with spectacular concert productions, and his Ostrava performance will be one of the biggest musical events of the entire year.

What you can expect from the DJ BoBo show:

| Show element | Description |
|------------|-------|
| Pyrotechnics | Fireworks, flames, and light effects right on stage |
| Dancers | A professional dance ensemble with choreographies |
| Visual effects | LED walls, laser shows, 3D projections |
| Chart-topping songs | Everybody, Chihuahua, Somebody Dance with Me |
| Show duration | Over 2 hours of unforgettable programming |

DJ BoBo has sold over 25 million records during his career, and his concerts are among the most sophisticated in all of Europe. The Ostrava concert will be part of a major arena tour passing through the most significant venues on the continent.

[Tickets for DJ BoBo in Ostrava can be secured here](/akce).

### Other autumn concerts in Ostrava

DJ BoBo is not the only star of the autumn season. Ostravar Aréna and other Ostrava concert venues are preparing a rich programme:

- **October 2026** — the peak of the arena season with the biggest names
- **November 2026** — pre-Christmas concerts and special events
- **September 2026** — the transition period between summer and the arena season

Follow [our events listing](/akce) for a current overview of all confirmed concerts.

### Ostravar Aréna — the heart of the autumn concert season

Ostravar Aréna is the main concert venue for the autumn and winter season in Ostrava. This modern multifunctional arena offers:

- **Capacity of over 10,000 spectators** — enough space for even the biggest shows
- **Top-tier acoustics** — designed with musical productions in mind
- **Comfortable seating and standing areas** — various ticket categories for every budget
- **Excellent accessibility** — public transport, parking, proximity to the centre
- **Complete facilities** — refreshments, cloakrooms, toilets at a high standard

### How to prepare for an arena concert

Arena concerts differ from open-air events in several ways. Here are practical tips:

1. **Arrive with time to spare** — entry to the arena may take longer due to security checks
2. **Check the rules** — each arena has specific rules regarding photography, bringing in drinks, etc.
3. **Choose the right ticket category** — at arena concerts, the choice of sector matters more than at open-air events
4. **Use public transport** — parking at Ostravar Aréna may be limited during sold-out concerts
5. **Save your ticket on your phone** — most arenas accept electronic tickets

### Comparison of summer and autumn seasons

| Criterion | Summer season | Autumn season |
|-----------|-------------|-----------------|
| Venues | Open-air, castles, parks | Arenas, halls |
| Weather | Dependent on forecast | Independent |
| Sound | Natural acoustics | Professional sound |
| Visual effects | Limited | Full-scale |
| Atmosphere | Summer ease | Intense experience |
| Capacity | Variable | Fixed, often higher |

### Why you should not buy tickets at the last minute

Autumn concerts in arena venues have a fixed capacity — once they sell out, no more tickets will be available. Unlike open-air events, where capacity can sometimes be increased, an arena has a set number of seats.

Especially for big names like **DJ BoBo**, tickets sell extremely quickly. We recommend:

- **Following the presale** — the first wave of tickets tends to be the best value
- **Buying online** — more convenient and often cheaper than on-site
- **Considering VIP tickets** — at arena concerts, VIP sections offer a significantly better experience
- **Checking [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce)** — regularly updated listings

### What autumn 2026 brings beyond music

Ostrava in the autumn months offers a range of accompanying cultural events — theatre premieres, film festivals, exhibitions, and gastronomic events. A concert in Ostrava can easily be combined with other cultural programming to make a whole weekend of it.

- **Gastronomy** — the Ostrava dining scene is among the best in Czechia
- **Landmarks** — Dolní oblast Vítkovice, Slezskoostravský hrad, the city centre
- **Nature** — autumn walks in the Beskydy mountains are just a few dozen minutes away
- **Shopping** — shopping centres in Ostrava offer a wide range of stores

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### When does DJ BoBo play in Ostrava?

**DJ BoBo** will perform at **Ostravar Aréna on 17 October 2026** as part of his Arena Tour. It is one of the biggest concert events of the autumn season in Ostrava.

### Where can I buy tickets for autumn concerts in Ostrava?

Tickets for autumn concerts in Ostrava, including DJ BoBo, can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce). We recommend buying in advance — arena concerts have limited capacity.

### Is the DJ BoBo concert in an arena or outdoors?

The DJ BoBo concert takes place in **Ostravar Aréna** — a modern covered arena with a capacity of over 10,000 spectators. The event will take place regardless of weather.

### How do I get to a concert at Ostravar Aréna?

Ostravar Aréna is accessible by public transport (trams and buses), by car (parking in the surrounding area), and on foot from the city centre. For major concerts, we recommend public transport.

### Are autumn concerts in Ostrava more expensive than summer ones?

Prices vary by specific event and performer. Arena concerts by major stars may be priced higher due to the more demanding production, but they also offer a qualitatively different experience. Current prices can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

title: Christmas concerts and events in Ostrava 2026 — an Advent guide
metaDescription: Christmas concerts and events in Ostrava 2026. Advent markets, festive concerts, and cultural programme. A guide to Christmas happenings in the Moravian-Silesian capital.
excerpt: Christmas time in Ostrava has its unmistakable atmosphere. The third largest Czech city transforms in December into a place full of lights, the scent of mulled wine, and — above all — live music. The 2026 Advent season brings...
body:
## Christmas concerts and events in Ostrava 2026 — an Advent guide

Christmas time in Ostrava has its unmistakable atmosphere. The third largest Czech city transforms in December into a place full of lights, the scent of mulled wine, and — above all — live music. The 2026 Advent season brings a rich concert programme that will appeal to lovers of classical music, pop, folk, and children's performances.

### Why spend Christmas in Ostrava

Ostrava has invested significantly in its Christmas cultural programme in recent years. The city offers a combination you will not find elsewhere in Czechia:

- **Industrial backdrops** — the Christmas atmosphere at Dolní oblast Vítkovice is absolutely unique
- **Historic centre** — Masarykovo náměstí and surroundings transform into a fairy-tale world
- **Slezskoostravský hrad** — the castle courtyard in winter decorations has a magical atmosphere
- **Multicultural influences** — the proximity of Poland and Slovakia enriches Christmas traditions

### Advent concerts and cultural programme

December in Ostrava is packed with concert events. A typical Advent programme includes:

| Event type | When | Where | For whom |
|----------|-----|-----|----------|
| Advent concerts | 1–23 December | Churches, cultural centres | Classical music lovers |
| Christmas pop concerts | Throughout December | Ostravar Aréna, clubs | General public |
| Children's performances | Advent weekends | Theatres, cultural centres | Families with children |
| Christmas markets with music | 28 Nov – 23 Dec | Masarykovo náměstí | Everyone |
| Midnight concerts | 24 December | Churches | Believers and non-believers |

The specific programme of Christmas events will be gradually published at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

### Advent markets in Ostrava — music as part of the experience

The Ostrava Advent markets are among the most visited in the Moravian-Silesian Region. In addition to traditional stalls with refreshments and handicrafts, the markets offer a rich cultural programme:

- **Live music on the main stage** — daily from afternoon to evening
- **Gospel choirs** — a traditional part of the Advent programme
- **Children's singing ensembles** — performances by school and church choirs
- **Folklore ensembles** — Moravian-Silesian Christmas traditions in live performance
- **DJ sets** — modern music for younger visitors

### Christmas concerts in churches

Ostrava is rich in historic churches with exceptional acoustics. Advent concerts in sacred spaces are among the most beautiful musical experiences of the entire year:

- **Cathedral of the Divine Saviour** — the largest church in Ostrava with monumental acoustics
- **Church of St. Wenceslas** — a historic landmark of Ostrava with regular concerts
- **Evangelical Christ Church** — a modern space with excellent sound

Christmas concerts in churches offer a repertoire ranging from Baroque music through classic Christmas carols to modern arrangements. Admission is often voluntary or for a symbolic fee.

### Tips for Christmas cultural programming for families

Christmas is above all about family. Ostrava thinks of families with children and prepares:

1. **Fairy-tale performances** — theatres in Ostrava stage special Christmas productions
2. **St. Nicholas events** — 5 and 6 December, traditional parades and meetings with St. Nicholas
3. **Christmas workshops** — creative workshops for children and adults
4. **Ice skating** — an ice rink in the city centre with musical accompaniment
5. **Light installations** — interactive light objects throughout the city

### How to enjoy Christmas Ostrava to the fullest

The Advent period is short but intense. To get the most out of it, we recommend:

- **Plan a weekend trip** — combine a visit to the markets with a concert
- **Book tickets in advance** — Christmas concerts often sell out
- **Visit lesser-known places** — besides the centre, Poruba, Vítkovice, and Hrabůvka are also worth a visit
- **Taste local specialities** — Ostrava's Christmas markets offer regional dishes
- **Come by public transport** — parking in the centre is limited during Advent

### Christmas concerts as a gift

A ticket to a Christmas concert is the ideal gift under the tree. Compared to material gifts, it offers an unforgettable experience — and research confirms that experience-based gifts bring greater and longer-lasting joy.

At [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) you will find:

- **Gift tickets** — an elegant form of gifting
- **Couple's tickets** — ideal for partners
- **Family packages** — discounted entry for the whole family
- **VIP tickets** — a luxury experience for the discerning

### Transport and practical information

Christmas Ostrava is easily accessible from all directions:

| From | How | Travel time |
|-------|-----|------------|
| Prague | Train / car | 3.5–4 hours |
| Brno | Train / car | 2–2.5 hours |
| Olomouc | Train / car | 1–1.5 hours |
| Katowice (PL) | Train / car | 1 hour |
| Žilina (SK) | Train / car | 1.5 hours |

During the Advent period, reinforced train services run and some buses offer special Christmas routes.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### When do Christmas events start in Ostrava 2026?

The Christmas season in Ostrava traditionally starts at the end of November — the Advent markets typically open on the last weekend of November and continue until 23 December. The concert programme runs throughout December.

### Where can I find an overview of Christmas concerts in Ostrava?

A complete and continuously updated overview of all Christmas concerts and events in Ostrava can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

### Are Christmas concerts in churches free of charge?

A number of Advent concerts in Ostrava's churches are accessible for voluntary admission. Some larger productions, however, require purchasing tickets. We recommend following the specific programme of individual events.

### Can I buy tickets for Christmas concerts as a gift?

Yes — concert tickets make an excellent Christmas gift. At [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce), you can purchase tickets that can be gifted in both electronic and printed form.

### What are the Advent markets in Ostrava like?

The Ostrava Advent markets on Masarykovo náměstí offer stalls with refreshments, handicrafts, and a rich cultural programme including live music. The markets are open daily from late November to 23 December.

title: New Year's Eve events in Ostrava 2026/2027 — celebrate the New Year with music

body:
## New Year's Eve events in Ostrava 2026/2027 — celebrate the New Year with music

New Year's Eve is the most anticipated party of the year — and Ostrava knows how to celebrate it in grand style. The last night of 2026 will offer a diverse programme in the Moravian-Silesian capital full of music, dancing, and unforgettable experiences. Whether you prefer a spectacular arena show, an intimate club concert, or an outdoor celebration with fireworks — Ostrava has something for you.

### Why celebrate New Year's Eve in Ostrava

Ostrava has built a reputation in recent years as a city that knows how to party. And New Year's Eve is proof of that:

- **Central fireworks** — a spectacular pyrotechnic show above the city
- **Live music on the square** — open-air concerts right in the centre
- **Club scene** — dozens of parties in clubs across the city
- **Arena concerts** — special New Year's Eve shows in large venues
- **Gastronomy** — New Year's Eve menus at the best Ostrava restaurants

### Types of New Year's Eve events in Ostrava

Ostrava offers a New Year's Eve programme for every taste and budget:

| Event type | For whom | Price category | Atmosphere |
|----------|----------|-------------------|-----------|
| Open-air on the square | Everyone | Free / low | Mass, energetic |
| Club party | Younger audience | Medium | Dance, nightlife |
| Arena concert | Music fans | Higher | Concert, spectacular |
| Restaurant celebration | Couples, groups of friends | Higher | Elegant, intimate |
| Hotel New Year's Eve | Discerning clientele | Premium | Luxury, all-inclusive |

### New Year's Eve open-air celebration in the centre

Masarykovo náměstí and surrounding streets traditionally transform on New Year's Eve into one big party under the open sky. The programme typically includes:

- **Live music from the evening hours** — bands and DJs on the main stage
- **Midnight countdown** — welcoming the New Year together with thousands of others
- **Fireworks** — a spectacular pyrotechnic show at exactly midnight
- **Refreshments** — stalls with hot drinks and food
- **Free entry** — the central celebration is traditionally free of charge

### New Year's Eve concerts and parties

Besides the central celebration, Ostrava offers a range of other New Year's Eve events:

1. **New Year's Eve concerts at Ostravar Aréna** — if a special New Year's Eve show is confirmed, it will be the highlight of the entire night
2. **Club parties** — Ostrava's clubs prepare themed New Year's Eve evenings with DJ sets and live music
3. **Theatre New Year's Eve** — some Ostrava theatres stage special New Year's Eve performances
4. **Gala evenings at hotels** — elegant celebrations with dinner, music, and entertainment

The specific programme of New Year's Eve events will be published at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) during autumn 2026.

### How to secure the best New Year's Eve

New Year's Eve in Ostrava requires planning — the most attractive events sell out quickly. We recommend:

- **Monitor the listings from October** — the first New Year's Eve events appear in presale as early as autumn
- **Book accommodation early** — hotels in the centre of Ostrava are booked months in advance for New Year's Eve
- **Buy tickets online** — avoid the risk of events selling out
- **Arrange transport in advance** — taxis and public transport are overloaded on New Year's Eve
- **Consider packages** — some hotels and restaurants offer all-inclusive New Year's Eve packages

### Practical tips for New Year's Eve night in Ostrava

To enjoy New Year's Eve in Ostrava without complications, remember:

- **Clothing** — a December night in Ostrava can be very cold; dress warmly (even if you plan to be outside only briefly)
- **Cash** — have enough cash on you; not all stalls accept payment cards
- **Phone** — charge your phone fully; the network tends to be overloaded at midnight
- **Meeting point** — agree on an exact meeting place with friends in advance; it is difficult to find each other in a crowd
- **Safety** — keep your valuables close and be cautious in crowds

### New Year's Eve programme for families with children

Not all New Year's Eve celebrations have to last until morning. Ostrava also offers a programme suitable for families:

- **Children's New Year's Eve** — some cultural centres organise afternoon New Year's Eve celebrations for children with a countdown at an early "children's" time
- **Family restaurants** — special New Year's Eve menus with an earlier start
- **Fireworks from a safe distance** — many spots in Ostrava offer a beautiful view of the central fireworks without needing to be in the crowd

### What to do on 1 January in Ostrava

New Year's Day in Ostrava does not have to mean just sleeping until noon. The city offers:

- **New Year's Day walks** — parks and the banks of the Ostravice river
- **New Year's Day concerts** — traditional classical concerts to welcome the new year
- **Wellness and relaxation** — hotels and spas offer New Year's Day recovery packages
- **Brunch** — popular cafés and restaurants serve special New Year's Day brunch

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### Where is the main New Year's Eve celebration held in Ostrava?

The central New Year's Eve celebration in Ostrava is traditionally held at **Masarykovo náměstí** and surrounding streets. The programme includes live music, a countdown, and fireworks at midnight. Entry is free.

### When will I find out the programme of New Year's Eve events in Ostrava 2026?

The New Year's Eve programme is published gradually from autumn 2026. Follow [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) for a current overview of all confirmed events.

### How much do tickets for New Year's Eve events in Ostrava cost?

Prices vary significantly — from the free central celebration on the square through club parties for a few hundred crowns to premium hotel gala evenings costing thousands of crowns. The current offer can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

### Is Ostrava safe on New Year's Eve?

Ostrava ensures an increased presence of police and emergency services on New Year's Eve. The central celebration is organised and safe. Follow basic precautions as you would at any large event.

### How can I get to the New Year's Eve celebration in Ostrava by public transport?

Ostrava's public transport provides extended service with reinforced connections on New Year's Eve into the early morning hours of 1 January. We recommend checking the current timetables on the Ostrava Public Transport Company website.

title: How to Buy the Cheapest Concert Tickets in Ostrava
metaDescription: How to buy the cheapest concert tickets in Ostrava. Tips on discounts, presales, early bird offers, and group tickets. Save on admission.
excerpt: Concerts in Ostrava are among the best musical experiences in the Czech Republic — but tickets for major events can be a significant investment. The good news is that there are plenty of ways to save while still enjoying great concerts...
body:
## How to Buy the Cheapest Concert Tickets in Ostrava

Concerts in Ostrava are among the best musical experiences in the Czech Republic — but tickets for major events can be a significant investment. The good news is that there are plenty of ways to save while still enjoying great concerts. In this guide, we'll share proven strategies that will help you get tickets at the best prices.

### Why Ticket Prices Vary

Before we dive into specific tips, it's important to understand how ticket pricing works:

- **Sales phase** — the price typically increases as the event date approaches
- **Seating category** — standing is cheaper than seated, distant sections cheaper than front rows
- **Event type** — festival tickets tend to be more cost-effective per artist than solo concerts
- **Day of the week** — weekday events may be cheaper than weekend ones
- **Season** — less busy months offer more favorable prices

### 7 Proven Ways to Save on Tickets

#### 1. Early Bird and Presales

The most effective strategy is simple — buy tickets as early as possible. Early bird offers can be **20–40% cheaper** than the standard price.

| Sales Phase | Typical Discount | Availability |
|-------------|------------------|--------------|
| Early bird | 20–40% | Limited quantity, first days of sale |
| Presale | 10–20% | Weeks to months before the event |
| Standard price | 0% | Regular sale |
| Last tickets | No discount / surcharge | Close to event date |

Follow [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) — we announce presale launches and early bird offers.

#### 2. Group Tickets

Going to a concert with friends? Many events offer group discounts:

- **Groups of 5+** — 5–10% discount
- **Groups of 10+** — 10–15% discount
- **Groups of 20+** — individual offer, potentially even higher discount

Tip: coordinate with your friends and colleagues and order tickets together. Everyone saves.

#### 3. Student and Senior Discounts

Many concert events in Ostrava offer reduced admission for:

- **Students** — with a valid ISIC or student ID
- **Seniors** — for visitors over 65
- **Children** — reduced or free admission for the youngest
- **Disability card holders** — reduced admission for people with disabilities (often including a companion)

Information about available discounts can always be found for each specific event at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

#### 4. Newsletter and Social Media

Subscribe to the newsletter and follow RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION and akceostrava.cz on social media. Benefits:

- **Exclusive discount codes** — for newsletter subscribers
- **Priority access to presales** — before the general public
- **Flash sale events** — short-term significant discounts
- **Ticket giveaways** — chance to win free tickets

#### 5. Combo Tickets and Festivals

If you want to see multiple artists, a festival ticket is almost always more cost-effective than individual concerts:

- **Hradni Oldies Festival** (May 16, 2026) — one ticket, several artists (Village People, Michal David, East 17, Tublatanka)
- **Festacek** (July 11, 2026) — all-day program for one price
- **Weekend passes** — some events offer discounted two-day tickets

Comparison: for the price of two individual concert tickets, you can often get an all-day festival pass with five or more artists.

#### 6. Choosing the Right Category

You don't always have to sit in the front row. When selecting a category, consider:

| Category | Price | Experience |
|----------|-------|-----------|
| VIP / Golden Circle | Highest | Closest to stage, exclusive amenities |
| Front section seating | Higher | Good view, comfort |
| Rear section seating | Medium | Overall overview, favorable price |
| Standing | Lowest | Dynamic atmosphere, freedom of movement |

For many concerts — especially energetic dance and pop shows — standing is the best choice not only price-wise but also experience-wise. In the middle of the crowd, you'll feel an atmosphere that you can't get from a seat.

#### 7. Timing Your Purchase

There are periods when tickets are most affordable:

- **Right after the event is announced** — early bird prices
- **Black Friday / Cyber Monday** — special ticket discount events
- **January** — New Year sales and offers for summer concerts
- **Gift season** — special packages may be available before Christmas

### What to Avoid — Costly Ticket-Buying Mistakes

Just as important as knowing where to save is knowing what to avoid:

- **Scalpers and unofficial sellers** — tickets from unofficial sources tend to be overpriced and risk being counterfeit
- **Last-minute purchases** — prices are highest and selection is smallest
- **Ignoring fees** — always verify the total price including service fees
- **Buying without comparison** — different sales channels may offer different prices

### Where to Buy Tickets Safely and at Good Prices

Buy exclusively from verified sellers. At [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) you'll find:

- **Official tickets** — guaranteed validity and authenticity
- **Transparent prices** — no hidden fees
- **Customer support** — help in case of issues
- **Secure payment** — encrypted payment gateways

### Overview of Upcoming Events in Ostrava 2026

Here are some events worth watching for presale:

| Event | Date | Venue |
|-------|------|-------|
| Kollarovci | May 15, 2026 | Slezskoostravsky hrad |
| Hradni Oldies Festival | May 16, 2026 | Slezskoostravsky hrad |
| Festacek | July 11, 2026 | Ostrava |
| DJ BoBo Arena Tour | October 17, 2026 | Ostravar Arena |

For all these events — the earlier you buy, the better. [Check current prices and availability](/akce).

### How Much You Can Really Save

With the right approach, you can save significantly on tickets:

- **Early bird + group of 10** — savings of up to 40–50% compared to standard price per person
- **Student discount + presale** — savings of 25–35%
- **Festival instead of solo concerts** — savings of 50–70% per artist

Over a year, you might attend 5–10 concerts and total savings can add up to thousands of Czech crowns.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### Where can I buy the cheapest concert tickets in Ostrava?

The cheapest tickets are available during the early bird and presale phases at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce). Also follow the newsletter for exclusive discount offers.

### Is it worth buying tickets in advance?

Absolutely yes. Early bird tickets can be 20–40% cheaper than the standard price. Plus, you're guaranteed entry — popular concerts sell out.

### Are there group discounts on tickets in Ostrava?

Yes — many events offer group discounts for groups of 5 or more. Specific terms vary by event. Information can be found for individual events at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

### Is it safe to buy tickets from scalpers?

We don't recommend it. Tickets from unofficial sellers may be overpriced, invalid, or counterfeit. Buy exclusively from verified sellers like akceostrava.cz.

### Can students and seniors get concert discounts?

Yes — many events offer reduced admission for students (with ISIC), seniors over 65, children, and disability card holders. Terms vary by specific event.

title: VIP Concert Tickets — Is It Worth Paying Extra?
metaDescription: Are VIP concert tickets in Ostrava worth it? Comparison of VIP and standard for DJ BoBo, Hradni Oldies, and other events. Find out what you get extra.
excerpt: You're facing a decision every music fan knows — buy a regular ticket or invest in VIP? The price difference can be several times greater, but what exactly do you get for that extra money? In this article...
body:
## VIP Concert Tickets — Is It Worth Paying Extra?

You're facing a decision every music fan knows — buy a regular ticket or invest in VIP? The price difference can be several times greater, but what exactly do you get for that extra money? In this article, we'll break down VIP options for specific events in Ostrava, compare them with standard tickets, and help you decide whether the premium is truly worth it.

### What a VIP Ticket Typically Includes

A VIP ticket isn't just a more expensive pass to the same spot. Depending on the event and venue, it can include a whole range of benefits that fundamentally change the concert experience:

- **Better view of the stage** — VIP sections are usually positioned at the optimal distance from the stage
- **Separate entrance** — no long queues at the main entrance
- **Private bar and refreshments** — often with premium drink options
- **More comfortable amenities** — better seats, more space, cleaner restrooms
- **Exclusive zone** — separated area without crowding
- **Nearby parking** — some events include a guaranteed parking spot

### Ticket Comparison for Ostrava Events 2026

Let's look at specific numbers. The following table compares price categories for selected Ostrava events organized by RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION.

| Event | Venue | Standard | VIP Standing / VIP Tribune | Highest VIP |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DJ BoBo | Ostravar Arena, Oct 17 | Tribune 975 CZK | VIP Tribune 2,490 CZK | Golden Seating 3,990 CZK |
| Hradni Oldies Festival | Slezskoostravsky hrad, May 16 | Standard 999 CZK | VIP standing 1,490 CZK | VIP terrace 2,990 CZK |
| Kollarovci | Slezskoostravsky hrad, May 15 | Standard | — | — |
| Festacek | Jul 11 | 599 CZK | — | — |

The table shows that the price difference between standard and the highest VIP category ranges from 1.5x (Hradni Oldies — VIP standing) to 4x (DJ BoBo — Golden Seating). So the question is — what do you get for that difference?

### DJ BoBo at Ostravar Arena — Three Levels of Experience

The DJ BoBo concert on October 17, 2026 offers three price categories that differ significantly.

**Tribune (975 CZK)** — the basic option with an assigned seat in the tribune. You'll see the entire show, which DJ BoBo is known for with spectacular effects, LED walls, and pyrotechnics. A perfectly adequate choice for most visitors.

**VIP Tribune (2,490 CZK)** — seats in better sections with a more comfortable view. Access to the VIP zone with a private bar. Ideal for those who want to take the experience up a notch without paying top price.

**Golden Seating (3,990 CZK)** — the most prestigious category. Seats in the best rows, premium amenities, and exclusive service. An investment that pays off especially for major international shows where the quality of the view is crucial.

### Hradni Oldies Festival — VIP Against a Historic Backdrop

The Hradni Oldies Festival on May 16, 2026 at Slezskoostravsky hrad offers a unique open-air atmosphere in a historic setting. Here VIP has a completely different character than in a hall.

**Standard (999 CZK)** — entry to the main festival area with a view of the stage. The full force of the open-air atmosphere.

**VIP standing (1,490 CZK)** — a surcharge of just under 500 CZK gets you into a separate zone closer to the stage. The price-to-value ratio here is one of the best — for a relatively low surcharge, you get a significantly better position.

**VIP terrace (2,990 CZK)** — a premium experience with an elevated view of the entire castle grounds and stage. Private bar, more comfortable setting, and a sense of exclusivity. A terrace on a historic castle at sunset — that's an experience a regular ticket can't provide.

### When VIP Is Worth It — and When It's Not

VIP isn't always the best choice. It depends on several factors.

**VIP is worth it when:**

- You're going as a gift or celebration — VIP adds a touch of distinction to the occasion
- You prefer comfort and don't want to be squeezed in a crowd
- A quality view of the stage is important to you
- You're planning a romantic evening for two
- You're attending a major international show (like DJ BoBo), where details of the performance are only appreciated by viewers in the front rows

**Standard is enough when:**

- You're going primarily for the atmosphere and music, not comfort
- You're visiting a festival where you'll be moving between stages anyway
- Your budget is limited and you want to see more events for the same money
- You're going with a larger group of friends — the group atmosphere replaces VIP benefits

### Price Breakdown — How Much Does the "Upgrade" Cost

Let's look at the VIP surcharge as a percentage increase over standard:

| Event | Upgrade to | Surcharge | Increase |
|---|---|---|---|
| DJ BoBo | VIP Tribune | +1,515 CZK | +155% |
| DJ BoBo | Golden Seating | +3,015 CZK | +309% |
| Hradni Oldies | VIP standing | +491 CZK | +49% |
| Hradni Oldies | VIP terrace | +1,991 CZK | +199% |

The overview shows that the **best price-to-value ratio** is offered by VIP standing at the Hradni Oldies Festival — for a surcharge under 500 CZK, you get a noticeably better position. Conversely, Golden Seating for DJ BoBo is a premium investment for those who want the absolute best experience without compromise.

### Tips for Getting VIP Tickets at Better Prices

- **Watch the presale** — VIP categories sell out fastest, but are most accessible during the early bird phase
- **Buy in pairs or groups** — some events offer discounted packages
- **Subscribe to the newsletter** — RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION informs subscribers about special offers first
- **Buy in advance** — VIP ticket prices tend to rise as the event date approaches

The complete ticket selection for all events can be found on the [events overview page](/akce).

### How to Choose the Right Category

When deciding, ask yourself these questions:

1. **What's the main reason for your visit?** — If you're going for the show and visual experience, VIP is worth it. If you're going for the atmosphere and music, standard is enough.
2. **Who are you going with?** — For a romantic evening for two, VIP is a great choice. For a group of friends, standard might be more fun.
3. **How many events do you plan to attend?** — If you want to visit multiple concerts, spread your budget. Two standards may be better than one VIP.
4. **What's the venue?** — At Ostravar Arena, the difference between tribune and Golden Seating is more pronounced than in the more intimate castle setting.

### FAQ — Most Common Questions About VIP Tickets

**Can I purchase a VIP upgrade after the fact?**
It depends on the event. For some concerts at Ostravar Arena, an upgrade is possible if the VIP section isn't sold out. We recommend contacting the organizer.

**Are VIP tickets transferable?**
Yes, tickets are generally transferable — you can give them away or sell them if you can't attend.

**What if the VIP section sells out?**
VIP categories often sell out first. Watch the offerings at the [events page](/akce) and buy in advance.

**Is catering included in the VIP price?**
It depends on the specific event and category. Some VIP packages include refreshments or a welcome drink, while others only provide access to the VIP bar with the option to purchase.

**Is VIP worth it for a festival like Festacek?**
Festacek (July 11, 599 CZK) is a children's festival where a VIP category is typically not offered. Here the focus is on family fun at an accessible price.

### Conclusion — An Investment in Experience

A VIP ticket isn't an unnecessary luxury — it's an investment in the quality of the experience. For spectacular shows like DJ BoBo at Ostravar Arena, Golden Seating can transform a concert into an unforgettable evening. For open-air festivals at Slezskoostravsky hrad, the VIP terrace offers a view that a regular visitor will never experience.

The key is to choose the right category for the right occasion. And whether you opt for standard or VIP — the most important thing is to be there. Tickets for all RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION events can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

title: Group Tickets and Discounts for Events in Ostrava
metaDescription: How to save on tickets in Ostrava? Group discounts, family packages, and more tips for buying tickets to concerts and festivals at great prices.
excerpt: Planning a trip to a concert with a group of friends, family, or work colleagues? Group ticket purchases can be a way to save while enjoying a great cultural experience. Ostrava is hosting a whole range of events in 2026...
body:
## Group Tickets and Discounts for Events in Ostrava

Planning a trip to a concert with a group of friends, family, or work colleagues? Group ticket purchases can be a way to save while enjoying a great cultural experience. Ostrava is hosting a whole range of events in 2026, from intimate concerts at Slezskoostravsky hrad to major shows at Ostravar Arena — and many of them offer ways to save on admission. Let's look at all the options.

### Why Buy Tickets as a Group

Group ticket purchases bring benefits that go beyond just financial savings:

- **Lower price per person** — group discounts typically range from 10 to 20%
- **Guaranteed seats together** — with individual purchases, you risk sitting separately
- **Simpler organization** — one person buys, others send them money
- **Shared experience** — a concert with friends is always better than going alone
- **Ability to share transport costs** — one car instead of five

### Overview of Events in Ostrava and Their Price Categories

Before we get into discount tips, let's look at an overview of key events organized by RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION in 2026:

| Event | Date | Venue | Price from |
|---|---|---|---|
| Kollarovci | May 15, 2026 | Slezskoostravsky hrad | by category |
| Hradni Oldies Festival | May 16, 2026 | Slezskoostravsky hrad | 999 CZK |
| Festacek | Jul 11, 2026 | — | 599 CZK |
| DJ BoBo | Oct 17, 2026 | Ostravar Arena | 975 CZK |

The complete ticket selection can be found on the [events page](/akce).

### How Group Discounts Work

Group discounts for cultural events in Ostrava work in several ways. It depends on the specific event, organizer, and sales channel.

**Direct group packages** — some events offer discounted packages directly in presale for groups (typically 5+, 10+, or 20+ people). The discount ranges from 10 to 20% off the regular price.

**Family tickets** — especially for family events like Festacek (July 11, 599 CZK), family packages are available that include entry for 2 adults and 1–3 children at a discounted price.

**Corporate orders** — for companies wanting to reward employees or organize team building, bulk purchase with individual pricing is available. Simply contact the organizer directly.

### Tips for Saving on Tickets Without a Group Discount

Even if you're not planning a group purchase, there are several ways to save on admission:

- **Early bird tickets** — the first wave of presale is usually the cheapest. The earlier you buy, the more you save
- **Newsletter subscription** — RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION sends subscribers exclusive offers and discounts
- **Following social media** — ticket giveaways and flash sale events
- **Buying when the event is announced** — the lowest prices tend to be on the day of official announcement
- **Standard category** — if you don't need VIP, standard at 999 CZK (Hradni Oldies) or 975 CZK (DJ BoBo Tribune) offers great value

### Organizing a Group Trip to a Concert

Organizing a group trip to a concert requires a bit of planning. Here's a proven approach:

**1. Choose an event and date**
Browse the offerings at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce) and select an event that appeals to the whole group. For a mixed group, the Hradni Oldies Festival (May 16) with its diverse lineup of artists is ideal. For families with children, Festacek (July 11) is a great choice.

**2. Set a budget**
Add up the costs of tickets, transport, accommodation if needed, and refreshments. For a group of 6 at the Hradni Oldies Festival, the budget might look like this:

| Item | Price per person | Total (6 people) |
|---|---|---|
| Standard ticket | 999 CZK | 5,994 CZK |
| Transport (shared car) | 150 CZK | 900 CZK |
| Refreshments (estimate) | 400 CZK | 2,400 CZK |
| **Total** | **1,549 CZK** | **9,294 CZK** |

With VIP standing (1,490 CZK per person), the total budget would increase by approximately 3,000 CZK — but the experience would be significantly better.

**3. Buy tickets at once**
One person from the group should buy all tickets at once. This ensures seats together and potentially qualifies for a group discount.

**4. Arrange transport**
For groups, car-sharing or arriving together by train to Ostrava is ideal. For concerts at Ostravar Arena, consider public transit — the tram takes you right to the arena and you avoid parking problems.

### Corporate Events and Team Building at Concerts

A concert or festival can be an excellent corporate team building activity. Compared to traditional team building, it offers several advantages:

- **Minimal organization** — just buy tickets, the organizer takes care of the program
- **Universal entertainment** — music entertains almost everyone
- **Informal setting** — colleagues get to know each other from a different side
- **Flexibility** — everyone enjoys themselves in their own way, without forced activities

For corporate groups, we recommend VIP categories — for example, the VIP terrace at the Hradni Oldies Festival (2,990 CZK) or VIP Tribune at DJ BoBo (2,490 CZK). The separate space creates a more intimate setting for a corporate group.

### Discounts for Specific Visitor Groups

Besides group discounts, there are other discount categories:

**Students and youth** — selected events offer discounts upon presenting a student ID (ISIC). Follow the current terms for specific events.

**Seniors** — some events offer reduced admission for seniors over 65.

**Disability card holders** — holders of disability cards are entitled to a discount or free entry for a companion at most events.

**Children** — at family festivals like Festacek, children under a certain age enter free. For other events, terms vary.

### How to Buy Tickets at akceostrava.cz

Buying tickets at [akceostrava.cz](/akce) is simple and fast:

1. Select an event from the overview
2. Choose the number of tickets and category
3. Fill in contact details
4. Pay online — by card or bank transfer
5. Receive tickets via email

For group orders over 10 tickets, we recommend contacting the organizer directly — they can offer individual terms.

### Comparison — How Much You Save as a Group

Let's look at a model example of savings with group purchase vs. individual:

| Scenario | Individually | Group of 6 | Savings per person |
|---|---|---|---|
| DJ BoBo Tribune + parking | 975 CZK + 200 CZK = 1,175 CZK | 975 CZK + 33 CZK (shared) = 1,008 CZK | 167 CZK |
| Hradni Oldies + taxi | 999 CZK + 350 CZK = 1,349 CZK | 999 CZK + 58 CZK (shared) = 1,057 CZK | 292 CZK |

Even without a direct group discount on admission, you save on shared transport and parking costs. With a potential group ticket discount, savings are even higher.

### FAQ — Most Common Questions About Group Tickets

**From how many people does a group discount apply?**
Usually from 5 or 10 people, depending on the specific event. For precise information, we recommend contacting the organizer or checking the terms on the [events page](/akce).

**Can I combine a group discount with an early bird price?**
Discounts generally cannot be combined. The early bird price is often more favorable than the group discount — it's worth comparing both options.

**How do I order tickets for a company with an invoice?**
Contact RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION directly. Corporate orders can be handled individually, including invoicing.

**Can we sit together as a group?**
Yes, when all tickets are purchased at once. For events with assigned seating (Ostravar Arena), the system automatically assigns adjacent seats if available.

**Are there family tickets for Festacek?**
Festacek (July 11, 599 CZK) is aimed at families with children. Follow the current offerings on the website — family packages are typically part of the presale.

### Conclusion — A Shared Experience for Less Money

Group ticket purchases are a smart way to save while enjoying a concert or festival to the fullest. Whether you're planning a trip with friends to the Hradni Oldies Festival, corporate team building at DJ BoBo, or a family day at Festacek — sharing costs and potential group discounts help you get the most out of your budget.

Don't forget to follow the offerings at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce), where you'll find current prices, categories, and ticket availability for all RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION events in Ostrava.

title: Early Bird Tickets — How to Save on Concerts and Festivals
metaDescription: What are early bird tickets and how can they help you save? A practical guide to presale phases for concerts and festivals in Ostrava 2026.
excerpt: Every experienced concert-goer knows it — those who buy early, buy cheap. Early bird tickets are one of the most effective ways to save on admission to concerts and festivals. Ostrava is hosting a number of great events in 2026...
body:
## Early Bird Tickets — How to Save on Concerts and Festivals

Every experienced concert-goer knows it — those who buy early, buy cheap. Early bird tickets are one of the most effective ways to save on admission to concerts and festivals. Ostrava is hosting a number of great events in 2026, from the Kollarovci through the Hradni Oldies Festival to the spectacular DJ BoBo show — and for all of them, buying early pays off.

### What Are Early Bird Tickets

Early bird is a marketing term for tickets sold in the first phase of presale at a discounted price. The principle is simple — the organizer offers a limited number of tickets at a lower price to kick-start sales and create buzz around the event. Once the early bird allocation sells out or the designated period ends, the price rises to the regular level.

Early bird tickets typically differ from regular ones in these ways:

- **Price** — usually 15–30% lower than standard
- **Availability** — limited number of units or time-limited offer
- **Categories** — often available in all categories (standard and VIP)
- **Terms** — the ticket is fully valid, no program restrictions

### How Price Escalation Works

Most major concerts and festivals use a tiered pricing system. Let's see what it typically looks like:

| Phase | Period | Price Level | Availability |
|---|---|---|---|
| Announcement (super early bird) | Day of announcement | Lowest price | Very limited |
| Early bird | Weeks after announcement | 15–30% cheaper | Limited |
| Standard presale | Months before event | Regular price | Wide |
| Final wave | Weeks before event | Increased price | Declining |
| At the door | Day of event | Highest price | Remaining |

The table shows that the difference between the cheapest and most expensive phase can be 50% or more. For major festivals, the price gap can amount to hundreds of Czech crowns.

### How Much You Can Save — Model Examples

Let's look at what savings might look like with early bird purchases for Ostrava events in 2026. The following examples are illustrative and based on typical discount schemes:

**DJ BoBo — Ostravar Arena (October 17, 2026)**

| Category | Regular Price | Possible Early Bird Price* | Savings |
|---|---|---|---|
| Tribune | 975 CZK | ~790 CZK | ~185 CZK |
| VIP Tribune | 2,490 CZK | ~1,990 CZK | ~500 CZK |
| Golden Seating | 3,990 CZK | ~3,290 CZK | ~700 CZK |

*Approximate prices — follow the current offerings at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

For more expensive categories, the absolute savings are naturally higher. Anyone buying two Golden Seating tickets in the early bird phase instead of regular sale can save over 1,400 CZK — that's more than an entire Festacek ticket.

**Hradni Oldies Festival — Slezskoostravsky hrad (May 16, 2026)**

Standard price 999 CZK, VIP standing 1,490 CZK, VIP terrace 2,990 CZK. With a 20% early bird discount on standard, you save approximately 200 CZK; on the VIP terrace, over 500 CZK.

### Where to Watch for Early Bird Offers

The key to success is staying informed. Here are the most reliable sources:

- **[akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce)** — the official page with an overview of all RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION events
- **Newsletter** — subscribers receive presale information first, often with exclusive access
- **Social media** — RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION Facebook and Instagram announce new events and presale phases
- **Ticket portals** — Ticketmaster, GoOut, Ticketportal, and others

### Smart Ticket-Buying Strategies

It's not enough to just know early bird exists — you need a strategy. Here are proven approaches from experienced concert-goers:

**1. Turn on notifications**
Follow RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION on social media with notifications enabled. New event announcements arrive instantly and you'll be among the first to learn about the presale.

**2. Have your budget ready**
The early bird phase lasts a limited time. You don't have time to think for weeks — decide quickly. Keep a "concert fund" set aside that you can draw from immediately.

**3. Buy for the whole group at once**
If you're planning to go with friends, agree in advance and buy during the early bird phase together. Everyone saves and you'll have seats together.

**4. Consider higher categories**
In the early bird phase, a VIP ticket might be cheaper than standard in later sales. For example, VIP standing at Hradni Oldies at an early bird price of ~1,200 CZK would be better value than standard at full price of 999 CZK — and with a better experience.

**5. Don't hesitate on sure things**
If you know you want to attend an event, don't delay the purchase. Early bird allocations for popular events sell out within hours or days.

### Risks of Late Purchasing

What happens if you delay your purchase? Besides a higher price, other problems await:

- **Selling out** — popular events like DJ BoBo at Ostravar Arena can sell out. Those who wait until the last minute may not get a ticket at all
- **Worse seats** — for events with assigned seating (Ostravar Arena), the best positions sell first
- **Stress** — scrambling for tickets at the last minute is unnecessarily stressful
- **Scalpers** — for sold-out events, tickets appear on the secondary market at many times the original price

### Timeline — When to Buy Tickets for 2026 Events

Let's look at the recommended purchase timeline for current Ostrava events:

| Event | Event Date | Ideal Purchase | Latest Purchase |
|---|---|---|---|
| Kollarovci | May 15, 2026 | March 2026 | Early May |
| Hradni Oldies Festival | May 16, 2026 | March 2026 | Early May |
| Festacek | Jul 11, 2026 | April–May 2026 | June 2026 |
| DJ BoBo | Oct 17, 2026 | May–June 2026 | September 2026 |

Currently (March 2026) is the ideal time to buy tickets for the May events at Slezskoostravsky hrad. For DJ BoBo, it's still relatively early — watch for the presale announcement.

### Early Bird vs. Last Minute — Which Is Better

Occasionally, last minute ticket offers appear at reduced prices. But that's the exception, not the rule.

| Parameter | Early Bird | Last Minute |
|---|---|---|
| Price | Guaranteed lower | Sometimes lower, often higher |
| Availability | High | Uncertain |
| Category selection | Complete | Only remaining seats |
| Seat selection | Best positions | Whatever's left |
| Certainty | 100% — ticket in hand | Risk of selling out |

Early bird wins decisively. Last minute only pays off for events that aren't selling well — and those usually aren't the ones you want to attend.

### FAQ — Most Common Questions About Early Bird Tickets

**Are early bird tickets somehow limited?**
No. An early bird ticket is a fully valid ticket for the chosen category. The only difference is the lower price — the program, access, and conditions are identical to regularly purchased tickets.

**Can I return an early bird ticket?**
Return conditions are the same as for regular tickets and are governed by the organizer's terms and conditions. We recommend reading the terms before purchasing.

**How do I know it's an early bird price?**
The organizer typically clearly marks the early bird phase in the offering — on the website, in the newsletter, and on social media. If you're unsure, check [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

**How many early bird tickets are usually available?**
It depends on the event. For smaller concerts, it may be dozens, for large festivals, hundreds. It's always a limited allocation — first come, first served.

**Does early bird apply to VIP categories too?**
For most events, yes. The discounted presale typically applies to all price categories, including VIP. The percentage discount is usually the same, but the absolute savings for VIP are higher.

### Conclusion — The Early Bird Catches the Worm

Early bird tickets are the most reliable way to save on concerts and festivals. A simple rule applies — the earlier you buy, the less you pay. For Ostrava RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION events in 2026, this is doubly true.

Don't miss the presale phases — follow the offerings at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce), subscribe to the newsletter, and be ready to buy as soon as sales open. Your wallet will thank you.

title: Where to Park at Ostravar Arena — Complete Parking Guide
metaDescription: Complete parking guide for Ostravar Arena in Ostrava. P1 Cinstar, street parking, tram alternatives. Everything for a comfortable arrival at a concert.
excerpt: Ostravar Arena is the largest concert and sports venue in Ostrava. A capacity of up to 12,500 spectators means that during major events — such as the DJ BoBo show on October 17, 2026 — the area around the arena fills up with...
body:
## Where to Park at Ostravar Arena — Complete Parking Guide

Ostravar Arena is the largest concert and sports venue in Ostrava. A capacity of up to 12,500 spectators means that during major events — such as the DJ BoBo show on October 17, 2026 — the area around the arena fills up with thousands of cars. Where should you park so your concert experience doesn't start with stress? In this guide, you'll find a complete overview of parking options, price comparisons, and tips for alternative transport.

### Overview of Parking Options

There are several parking options around Ostravar Arena. Each has its pros and cons — it depends on your priorities.

| Option | Distance from arena | Approximate price | Capacity | Suitability during events |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| P1 Cinstar | 200 m | 50–100 CZK/hr | Approx. 500 spots | High, but fills up quickly |
| Street parking (Ruska, Zavodni) | 300–800 m | Free / blue zones | Limited | Medium |
| Parking at Forum Nova Karolina mall | 1.5 km | Per mall pricing | Large | Good alternative |
| Park & Ride + tram | 3+ km | Free / low | Large | Most comfortable |

### P1 Cinstar — The Nearest Parking Lot

The P1 Cinstar parking lot (formerly known as the Cinstar multiplex parking lot) is the nearest large-capacity parking facility to Ostravar Arena. It's located approximately 200 meters from the main entrance — about a 3-minute walk.

**Advantages:**
- Shortest distance from the arena
- Lit and monitored
- Easy access from Ruska street

**Disadvantages:**
- Fills up very quickly during major events — arrive at least 60–90 minutes before the start
- Risk of traffic jams when leaving after the event
- Hourly rate may be increased during events

**Tip:** If you're heading to DJ BoBo (starting in the evening), we recommend arriving at P1 Cinstar at least 2 hours before the start. After the concert, expect a 20–30 minute wait when exiting.

### Street Parking Around the Arena

Parking in surrounding streets is possible, but conditions vary significantly by specific location.

**Ruska Street and Surroundings**
The main road running past the arena. Parking directly on Ruska is limited — it's a busy road with minimal parking spaces. In adjacent streets, free spots can be found, but during events they're taken even an hour before the start.

**Zavodni Street and Adjacent Streets**
Zavodni street runs south of the arena and offers more options for street parking. The distance is approximately 500–800 meters, or 8–12 minutes on foot. Some sections fall within blue zones — always check traffic signage.

**Residential Zones**
Watch out for blue residential parking zones. Parking in these zones without authorization is subject to a fine. Blue zones are clearly marked with both vertical and horizontal signage.

### Parking at Forum Nova Karolina Mall

The Forum Nova Karolina shopping center has an underground parking garage with capacity for over 1,000 vehicles. The distance from the arena is approximately 1.5 km — about 18 minutes on foot or 2 tram stops.

**Advantages:**
- Large capacity — usually has spaces even during events
- Covered parking (suitable in bad weather)
- Option to shop before the concert
- Easy exit after the event (arena traffic jams don't affect you)

**Disadvantages:**
- Greater distance — need to transfer by tram or walk
- Parking fee per mall pricing (verify current rates)
- Limited opening hours — verify that parking is operational even after an evening concert ends

### Tram as the Best Alternative

If you want to attend a concert at Ostravar Arena stress-free, the tram is hands-down the best choice. The **Vystaviste** stop is located right at the arena — literally 50 meters from the entrance.

**Key tram lines:**
- Trams heading to the Vystaviste stop take you right to the arena
- Services run from the center of Ostrava, from Poruba, Dubina, and other parts of the city
- During major events, additional services are deployed

**Park & Ride strategy:**
The most comfortable option combines parking on the outskirts with the tram:

1. Park at a Park & Ride (P+R) lot or at one of the outlying stops
2. Board a tram towards Vystaviste
3. After the concert, take the tram back to your car
4. Avoid traffic jams, stress, and the hunt for a parking spot

This strategy saves nerves, time, and parking fees. With a fare of around 30 CZK, it's a fraction of what you'd pay for parking near the arena.

### Time Plan — When to Arrive

Correct arrival timing is crucial. Here's a recommended schedule for a major event (e.g., DJ BoBo, October 17, 2026):

| Arrival before start | Chance at P1 Cinstar | Street parking | Tram |
|---|---|---|---|
| 3 hours | Almost certain | Free spots | Empty |
| 2 hours | High | Still available | Comfortable |
| 1 hour | Low | Very limited | Busier, but OK |
| 30 minutes | Minimal | Nearly impossible | Additional services |

### After the Concert — How to Avoid Traffic Jams

Leaving after a concert is often a bigger challenge than arriving. Thousands of people leave the arena at once and surrounding roads immediately clog up.

**Tips for a smooth departure:**

- **Don't rush** — wait 15–20 minutes after the end of the event before heading out. Traffic jams usually clear within 30 minutes
- **Use the tram** — additional services run even after the event ends
- **Plan your route in advance** — if you're parked in surrounding streets, have an alternative route planned in your navigation away from main roads
- **Go for dinner** — restaurants near the arena are a great way to wait out the post-concert traffic rush

### Parking for Specific Groups

**Visitors with Disabilities**
Ostravar Arena has designated parking spots for disability card holders in the immediate vicinity of the barrier-free entrance. We recommend arriving well in advance — the number of reserved spots is limited.

**VIP Visitors**
For some events, a VIP ticket (e.g., Golden Seating at 3,990 CZK for DJ BoBo) includes access to reserved parking. Verify the terms when purchasing your ticket at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

**Buses and Minibuses**
For organized groups, bus parking is available near the arena. Contact the organizer in advance for coordination.

### Area Map — Landmarks

For easier navigation around Ostravar Arena:

- **Ostravar Arena** — Ruska 3077/135, Ostrava-Zabreh
- **P1 Cinstar** — opposite the arena, accessed from Ruska street
- **Vystaviste stop** — right at the arena (tram)
- **Forum Nova Karolina** — Jantarova 3344/4, Ostrava-Moravska Ostrava (1.5 km north)

### FAQ — Most Common Questions About Parking at Ostravar Arena

**How much does parking at P1 Cinstar cost during a concert?**
Prices vary by event. The standard rate is around 50–100 CZK per hour; during major events, a flat evening rate may apply. We recommend checking the current pricing before your visit.

**Is parking near the arena safe?**
The P1 Cinstar parking lot is monitored and lit. For street parking, we recommend standard precautions — don't leave visible valuables in your car.

**How many trams run after a concert?**
During major events, additional services are deployed. Trams run for at least an hour after the event ends. The exact schedule can be found on the DPO (Dopravni podnik Ostrava) website.

**Can I come by bike?**
Yes, there are bike racks at Ostravar Arena. It's not the most common option, but in nice weather it's a perfectly functional solution — no traffic jams, no parking.

**How far is the nearest gas station?**
There are several gas stations in the arena's vicinity on Ruska and Plzenska streets — you can refuel conveniently before or after the concert.

### Conclusion — Plan Ahead

Parking at Ostravar Arena during major concerts requires planning. The best strategy is to arrive well in advance at P1 Cinstar, or use tram transport — the Vystaviste stop is literally at the arena's doorstep.

For the DJ BoBo concert on October 17, 2026, we recommend a Park & Ride combination — park outside the center and come by tram. You'll save nerves, time, and money. Tickets for DJ BoBo and other events can be found at [akceostrava.cz/akce](/akce).

title: Getting to Concerts in Ostrava — Public Transit, Car, Train
metaDescription: How to get to a concert in Ostrava? Complete transport guide — public transit, car, train, parking. Tips for Ostravar Arena and Slezskoostravsky hrad.
keywords: how to get to Ostravar Arena
excerpt: Ostrava is the third largest city in the Czech Republic and its cultural scene grows every year. Whether you're heading to a Kollarovci concert at Slezskoostravsky hrad, to the Hradni Oldies Festival, the children's Festacek, or...
body:
## Getting to Concerts in Ostrava — Public Transit, Car, Train

Ostrava is the third largest city in the Czech Republic and its cultural scene grows every year. Whether you're heading to a Kollarovci concert at Slezskoostravsky hrad, to the Hradni Oldies Festival, the children's Festacek, or the spectacular DJ BoBo show at Ostravar Arena — transport is one of the first practical problems you need to solve. In this guide, you'll find a complete overview of transport options for all major concert venues in Ostrava.

### Overview of Concert Venues and Their Accessibility

The two main locations for major RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION events in 2026 differ significantly in terms of transport accessibility:

| Venue | Address | Public Transit | Parking | Accessibility |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Ostravar Arena | Ruska 3077/135, Zabreh | Tram — Vystaviste stop | P1 Cinstar, surrounding streets | Excellent |
